title: Discovery Catalog Registry
description: Catalog of all agents in the discovery-catalog repository.

version.description: Schema version of this registry file.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last registry update.

entries.description: One entry per agent in the repo.

name.description: Human-readable name of the agent (from metadata.yaml).

publisher_name.description: Name of the team or organisation that published this entry (from metadata.yaml).

path.description: Relative path from repo root to the agent folder, e.g. agents/my-agent.

associated_tools.description: Relative paths (from repo root) to each Discovery computation tool container folder under this agent's tools/ directory.

foundry_tools.description: Foundry-native tool names referenced in agent.yaml (e.g. web_search, mcp, openapi). Empty for agents with no Foundry-native tools.

supported_regions.description: Azure region ARM aliases where this agent is supported (optional; empty means all regions).

description.description: Short description of the agent (from metadata.yaml).
